get.description: Retrieves the full profile of any user. Requires administrative privileges.

put.description: Updates personal details for a specific user. Requires administrative privileges.

get.description: Retrieves the full profile details (Personal + Role Specific) of the currently logged-in user.

put.description: Updates editable personal details (Bio, Preferred Name, etc.) for the current user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated student's medical record.

put.description: Updates medical contacts and insurance details for the authenticated student.

post.description: Creates the authenticated student's medical record once. Duplicate creation is blocked.

put.description: Updates an existing address owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes an existing address owned by the authenticated user.
